headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Underperform on Mid-America Apartment, Raises Price Target to $129
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a Sector Underperform and raises the price target from $120 to $129.

headline: REITs: Cheap, Unloved, And Finally Showing Life
summary: REITs in 2026 are defying rising yields as fundamentals, M&A, NOI growth, and dividend hikes drive returns.
